records.ety: [NL., fr. Gr. <?/, fr. <?/ to make to grow together; sy`n with + <?/ to cause to grow; to grow.]

defs: An articulation formed by intervening cartilage; as, the pubic symphysis.
The union or coalescence of bones; also, the place of union or coalescence; as, the symphysis of the lower jaw. Cf. Articulation.
